author: pillowcase
text:
Derive runtime_in_squash_error's help text from the path table

review_safety::runtime_in_squash_error built its parenthetical example list of `.balls/` subpaths from a hardcoded literal — the last hand-maintained enumeration that bl-228d's runtime_paths table set out to eliminate. It was already stale: bl-c439 added .balls/state-repo to the backstop set without updating this string, so a state-repo rejection printed help text omitting state-repo.

Build the list from runtime_paths::backstop_paths() instead, stripping the .balls/ prefix the surrounding sentence already factors out. A new backstop sidecar now appears in the help text automatically — no second place to remember.

Add runtime_in_squash_error_lists_backstop_subpaths, asserting every backstop path's subpath shows up in the message, so the literal cannot silently drift back.
